text.message: Blue, I'd love to work something out here
Tbh you're setup is about to be insane
Can you save me some wheat for my second pick and I'll trade you a few ore along the way?
I was thinking wheat port play for you
Wow I didn’t notice I was gonna do 269
Haha well, we should be even just on that alone then
And now that I'm thinking about it, I was going to get wheat either way
i was going to say that lol
Jeez, it's time to stop playing for the day, I'm afraid
Black, how many roads do you have?
Red i wont settle there dont worry
Judging by these rolls I won't either lol
To block green on the bottom right
I haven’t made a positive play in 20 turns
i think you could go towards the 8 ore
